## Architectural Verification Checklist

- [ ] Contributes strictly according to [03_RULES.md](docs/03_RULES.md) and [13_ENGINEERING_GUIDELINES.md](docs/13_ENGINEERING_GUIDELINES.md).

- [ ] `melos run analyze` completes with zero static analysis warnings.
